bucket: metric missing unit_family exact-name carry-forward tail

subagent_inputs.name: Avicenna
subagent_inputs.role: read-only audit of remaining metric missing-unit tail
subagent_inputs.summary: Recommended an exact-name carry-forward slice for finite numeric or finite money-range metric rows with no existing unit/unit_normalized, while deferring same-name conflicts and known traps.

implemented_changes.summary: Added exact-name missing-unit inference for audited count, complaint, money, population, safety, enforcement, ridership, and workforce metric names.

Kept existing gates: no overwrite of submitted unit/unit_normalized, finite numeric values required except finite money ranges, money rows require dollar/USD/currency evidence, complaint rows require count-shaped non-percent evidence.
Added a population evidence helper for exact population-style names, requiring population, resident, individual, people, KSI, killed, injured, crash, or fatality context.
Added representative positive coverage for the new exact-name units and negative coverage for audited traps.

intentionally_unresolved.reason: Raw text says 6 EEO complaints and 12 separate bases while stored value is 8, so the complaint count gate correctly leaves it unresolved.
Deferred because same-name normalized conflicts, rate/percent ambiguity, or insufficient deterministic evidence require a separate audit.

metric_names: procurement_amount without finite value or money evidence
intentionally_unresolved.reason: Negative tests assert these do not normalize under this slice.

commands.result: Materialized 93067/98115 submissions; retired submissions skipped 265; Pages 7335; SQLite FTS quick_check ok
Issues: 0; Submissions 98115; Canonical records 84027; Wiki pages 7331

next_lanes: Audit the remaining 421 missing unit-family metric rows for additional exact-name, source-backed groups.
Prioritize non-other identity backlog next when a duplicate or false-duplicate bucket has a measurable open count.
Keep train derailment/collision, crash injury, monthly ridership, lost-time injury rate, and revenue/funding ambiguity out of automatic carry-forward until a bounded audit proves a safe rule.
